title: SovrnAgentCredential (locked-design shape)
description: LOCKED-DESIGN copy of agent-credential.v1.json for conformance fixtures. CONVERGED with the draft schema (WP3, 2026-07-07): the draft adopted the locked Layer 1 shape — array `proof` (D3), optional `agentType` (D1), `principalType` (D2). Historical note: the pre-WP3 divergence was THREE spots, not the two JC-F2 originally counted (D2 was the undercount). Fixtures keep validating against THIS frozen copy; a convergence meta-test now asserts the two schemas stay identical on the reconciled surface (re-drift tripwire).

@context.description: JSON-LD contexts. Must include W3C VC 2.0 context and Sovrn agent context.

id.description: DID of the issuing authority (zone authority, platform, or self)
Agent DID (did:sovrn:agent:{uuid} or other DID method)

agentType.description: Agent operational mode. OPTIONAL per Layer 1 D1 (not a trust signal).

principalDID.description: DID of the human principal who controls this agent

principalType.description: Principal class. Default NATURAL per Layer 1 D2.

issuanceMethod.description: How this credential was issued. SELF_ATTESTED provides identity only, not trust. ZONE_ISSUED carries authority attestation.

jurisdictions.description: Zone federation IDs where this capability is valid. '*' for all zones.

constraints.description: Action-specific constraints (max values, approval thresholds, etc.)

principalKYC.description: Whether the principal has completed identity verification

agentCodeAudit.description: Whether the agent code has been audited

credentialHash.description: Cryptographic hash of the credential content for integrity verification. Algorithm prefix provides agility.

type.description: Evidence type identifier. Common types: UCANDelegation, KYCAttestation.

evidence.description: Supporting evidence (delegation tokens, KYC attestations, audit results). For DELEGATED agents the full UCAN witness chain (Layer 1 D7).

items.description: A single W3C Data Integrity proof (or SD-JWT/COSE external proof). Index 0 is the issuer proof; indices 1+ are co-signer proofs (Layer 1 D3). verifySignatures checks every entry.

proof.description: Array of proofs (multi-proof co-signing). LOCKED shape per Layer 1 D3 — diverges from the draft schema's single-object proof.
